Provide proofs to establish the validity of the following arguments:

a. $\ph\disj\psi\proves\psi\disj\ph$

b. $\proves \ph\disj\neg\ph$

c. $\ph\conj\psi\proves\neg(\neg\ph\disj\neg\psi)$

d. $\ph\conj(\psi\vee\chi)\proves(\ph\conj\psi)\vee(\ph\conj\chi)$

e. $\ph\iff\psi\proves\neg\ph\iff\neg\psi$

f. $\ph\iff\neg\psi, \ph\iff(\psi\iff\chi)\proves\neg\chi$
